title: Anime Music
description: Replaces minecraft main menu and music discs music with anime music.
body:
Replaces minecraft main menu and music discs music with anime music.                                       
                                               
So far the replaced discs music with anime music are:                                                      
Disc 13-"The Cruel Angel's Thesis", Neon Genesis Evangelion opening                        
Disc 5-"Kuusou Mesorogiwi", Mirai Nikki opening 1                                                                             
Disc cat-"Guitar, Loneliness and Blue Planet"                                                                          
Disc pigstep-"IRIS OUT", Chainsaw Man movie opening                                                              
Disc otherside-"Departure", Hunter x Hunter opening 1                                                    
Disc stal-"Ranbu no Melody", Bleach opening 13                                                                                                           
Disc chirp-"It's Going Down Now"                                                                                      
Disc far-"Yuusha", Frieren opening 1                                                                                                                       
Disc mellohi-"Redo", Re:ZERO opening 1                                                                                                                                      
Disc strad-"Black Catcher", Black Clover opening 10                                                                   
Disc wait-"Kyouran Hey Kids!!", Noragami opening 2                                                        
Disc mall-"Seishun Complex", Bocchi the Rock opening                                                         
Disc blocks-"Never forget"  
Disc creator-"Recollect", Re:Zero opening 6                                                        
Disc tears-"Fatima", Steins;Gate 0 opening 1                                                             
Disc ward-"Colors", Code Geass opening 1                                                                    
Disc precipice-"AIZO", Jujutsu Kaisen opening 5                                                                    
Disc relic-"BLOODY STREAM", JoJo's opening 2                                                             
Disc lava chicken-"Motteke! Sailor Fuku", Lucky Star opening
                                                                                                                  
Main menu music is "Rockn' Roll, Morning Light Falls on You"
